Subject: WSCC (Coronado & Contra Costa) & FRCC (St Lucie) Forced Outages
Message:
Dear Power Outage Database Customer, 
Attached you will find an excel document. The outages contained within are forced outages. Your daily delivery will still contain these outages. 
In addition to the excel document, there is a dbf file that is formatted like the daily delivery you receive nightly. This will enable you to load the data into your regular database. Any questions please let me know.
